Box office collection

[edit]

The following is the list of highest-grossing Tamil films released in 2026. The rank of the films in the following table depends on the estimate of worldwide collections as reported by organizations classified as green by Wikipedia.[a] There is no official tracking of domestic box office figures within India.

  Background shading indicates that a film is currently showing in theatres worldwide.
#+ Implies that the film is multilingual and the gross collection figure includes the worldwide collection of the other simultaneously filmed version.

  1. ^ See WP:RSP, WP:ICTFSOURCES
  2. ^ According to Samayam, the film grossed ₹305 crore worldwide.[1] The Siasat Daily stated that the film grossed ₹310 crore worldwide.[2] As per Hindustan Times, the film earned ₹340 crore worldwide.[3]
  3. ^ Parasakthi's reported worldwide grosses vary between ₹84 crore (The Economic Times[4]) – ₹85 crore (The Indian Express[5]) – ₹100 crore (Filmfare[6])
  4. ^ Thaai Kizhavi's reported worldwide grosses vary between ₹72 crore (News18[8]) – ₹75 crore (The Economic Times[9]) – ₹81.7 crore (India Today[10]).
  5. ^ Youth's reported worldwide grosses vary between ₹70 crore (Filmfare[11]) – ₹81 crore (Asianet News Tamil[12]) – ₹82 crore (India Today[13]).
  6. ^ Kara's reported worldwide grosses vary around ₹50 crore according to Hindustan Times[16], News18[17], and The Statesman[18].
  1. ^ The film was shot in both Tamil and Malayalam simultaneously.
